title: TGF-Î² ANTAGONIST CONJUGATES
abstract: of the Invention The present invention provides conjugates containing a (i) TGF-Î² antagonist, such as a TGF-Î² antagonist antibody, protein, peptide, or small molecule capable of inhibiting TGF-Î² signaling, bound to (ii) a bone-targeting moiety. The bone targeting moiety localizes the TGF-Î² antagonist to osseous tissue. 0 The conjugates described herein provide a therapeutic paradigm for the treatment of various diseases associated with elevated TGF-Î² signaling and elevated bone turnover, such as osteogenesis imperfecta and other bone pathologies.
